content: Hi, I'm Spencer. I'm a veterinarian at a rural practice and I'm recovering from a knee injury.
Hi Spencer, sorry to hear that you're recovering from an injury. How are you doing and what happened?
I'm doing okay, thanks for asking. I slipped on some ice and fell, which caused a pretty bad knee sprain. I've been out of commission for a few weeks now.
Oh no, that sounds painful. Are you going to physical therapy or doing any exercises to help with your recovery?
Yeah, I'm doing physical therapy twice a week and I'm also doing some exercises at home to help strengthen my knee.
That's great. It's good that you're taking proactive steps to help with your recovery. Have you had to make any changes to your daily routine or work schedule?
Yeah, I've had to make some adjustments. I've been taking it easy and not doing as much heavy lifting or bending, which has been a bit of a challenge for me as a vet.

I can imagine. It's not easy to have to limit your activities, especially when you're used to being so active. Have you found any new hobbies or interests to help pass the time while you're recovering?
Actually, I've gotten into knitting, which has been a great way to relax and keep my hands busy. I've also been listening to a lot of podcasts and playing board games with my friends.
That sounds like a great way to spend your time. Knitting can be very therapeutic and podcasts are a great way to learn new things or escape into a different world.
Yeah, I've really been enjoying it. I've even started making some scarves and hats for my friends and family.

That's great. It's always nice to be able to create something with your own hands and give it to others as a gift. Have you thought about attending any social events or gatherings while you're recovering?
Actually, I'm planning on attending a dinner party at my friend's house next weekend. It'll be nice to get out and socialize a bit.
That sounds like a great idea. It's good that you're getting out and being social, even if it's just for a little while. Do you have any other fun plans for the upcoming weeks?
Yeah, I'm planning on going to a concert in a few weeks. I love live music and it'll be a great way to get out and enjoy myself.
That sounds like a blast. Live music is always a great way to lift your spirits and have a good time. Are you planning on going with anyone or meeting up with friends there?
Yeah, I'm going with my friend Emily. We've been friends since college and it'll be great to catch up and spend some time together.
That's great. It's always nice to have friends to share experiences with. I'm sure you'll have a great time at the concert and enjoy each other's company.
Thanks, I'm looking forward to it. It'll be a great way to take my mind off my injury and just have some fun.
You're welcome. I'm sure you'll have a great time and make some wonderful memories with your friend.
